name: Sen. Ellender's Basic Sauce
recipeIngredient: A few dashes of Worcestershire sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a hot pan, add flour and stir constantly until it forms a scorchy-tasting roux.
2. Add onions and fry slowly until they are thoroughly browned and reduced to pulp.
3. Add the remaining ingredients all at once and continue cooking slowly for at least 30-45 minutes.
4. For a thicker sauce, make the roux with 2 to 4 tablespoons of flour instead of one tablespoon.
5. Use this Basic Sauce in gumbos, stews, jambalayas, or as Sauce Picante. It can also be used in Sen. Ellender's Shrimp Creole, Chicken Sauce Picante, Courtbouillon, and Gumbo. Consider making extra sauce and freezing individual portions for later use.
Source: DIXIE magazine, New Orleans LA Oct 3 1971
Recipe date: 10/03/71
